note: Fixed 7-slide carousels, 2/day. Each post has a local 'publish_at' (interpreted in 'timezone'). The scheduler posts whatever is due and not already posted. A post only publishes when 'status' is 'ready'. Image folder name must equal the slug.

posts.caption:
You check the number after you buy, never before. There's a reason — and a two-minute fix.

Save this — looking counts as the first rep.

#moneyanxiety #financialtherapy #moneypsychology #moneymindset #personalfinance
posts.firstComment: How long since you looked before buying? Days, weeks, years — drop it. No judgment.

posts.caption:
You don't know your balance. You know a vibe. Let's measure the gap.

Save this — looking counts as the first rep.

#moneyanxiety #financialtherapy #moneypsychology #moneymindset #personalfinance
posts.firstComment: How far off were you? Twenty? A hundred? Drop the gap. No judgment.

posts.caption:
Your budget didn't fail because you're undisciplined. It was built to die. Here's the autopsy.

Save this for the next time yours flatlines.

#moneyanxiety #financialtherapy #moneypsychology #moneymindset #personalfinance
posts.firstComment: What day does yours usually die? Drop the number. No judgment.

posts.caption:
The unread bank emails aren't laziness. They're a shame archive. Your brain is the archivist.

Save this — counting is the whole assignment.

#moneyanxiety #financialtherapy #moneypsychology #moneymindset #personalfinance
posts.firstComment: Count yours tonight. Then drop the number here. No judgment.

posts.caption:
Open the app. Look at one number. Close it. That's the whole exercise. I'll go first.

Save this — it's your first rep.

#moneyanxiety #financialtherapy #moneypsychology #moneymindset #personalfinance
posts.firstComment: How many days since your last look? Drop the number. No judgment.

posts.caption:
Your savings account is named 'Savings.' That's exactly why it's empty.

Save this, then go rename yours.

#moneyanxiety #financialtherapy #moneypsychology #moneymindset #personalfinance
posts.firstComment: Go look at yours. If it still says "Savings," drop the new name here. No judgment.

posts.caption:
You muted your bank and called it self-care. Let's turn one thing back on.

Save this — deposits-only is the loophole.

#moneyanxiety #financialtherapy #moneypsychology #moneymindset #personalfinance
posts.firstComment: How long has yours been muted? Weeks? Years? Drop it. No judgment.

posts.caption:
You set up auto-savings, then moved the money back by Friday. This loop has an off-switch.

Save this for payday morning.

#moneyanxiety #financialtherapy #moneypsychology #moneymindset #personalfinance
posts.firstComment: So — what day does yours crawl back? Drop the day. No judgment.

posts.caption:
There's one site that gets you at midnight. Let's make buying take ninety seconds longer.

Save this — deletion, not discipline.

#moneyanxiety #financialtherapy #moneypsychology #moneymindset #personalfinance
posts.firstComment: Which site is it? First letter only. No judgment here.

posts.caption:
Your budget had 23 categories. You built yourself a job, then quit it. Cut it to three.

Save this — bills, life, keep.

#moneyanxiety #financialtherapy #moneypsychology #moneymindset #personalfinance
posts.firstComment: How many categories did yours have? Drop the number. No judgment.

posts.caption:
The mid-month bill ambush isn't bad luck. Move one due date and it stops.

Save this before day 17.

#moneyanxiety #financialtherapy #moneypsychology #moneymindset #personalfinance
posts.firstComment: What day does yours hit — drop the number. No judgment.

posts.caption:
You're paying rent on the person you were going to become. Let's cancel it together.

Save this — stop paying an old identity.

#moneyanxiety #financialtherapy #moneypsychology #moneymindset #personalfinance
posts.firstComment: How many months have you paid without opening it? Drop the number. No judgment.
